name_en: 【White Paris💯 3-Grid Embroidery Lady Dior】The Lady Dior embroidered bag features a fashionable and soft "CHRISTIAN DIOR" logo. Adorned with the iconic "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a large detachable double-sided embroidered shoulder strap for versatile carrying options. Detachable double-sided wide strap, internal zip pocket and patch pocket. Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, easily paired with other embroidered straps.

Size: 17×7.5×14cm
